record.field:
Condominium

This industry is tailor-made for condominium businesses that aim to manage the co-ownership properties. Such a business is complex because it implies to manage all the aspects of the properties while fairly splitting the charges. Moreover, the business is legally regulated in lots of countries under different names: condo in US, co-ownership in Canada, joint domination in UK, property syndicate in France, syndic in Belgium, etc.

Odoo empowers you to effortlessly and efficiently manage every aspect of the condominiums under your responsibility, ensuring homeowners satisfaction thanks to its suite of integrated applications.

Condominium Business Flows Easily convert the homeowner associations 🖋️ Never forget a task ⚡ Quickly set up a condominium  🚀 Know the stakeholders 🔎 Provide the best customer service 🆘 Fairly split the costs ⚖️ Book the right numbers 🧾 Schedule the meetings 📅 Efficiently count the votes 🧮
💡

Click on the  🎓Buttons  to get access to the related documentation

Double click on the Purple Links to be redirected in the corresponding Odoo screen

Business Flows

Easily convert the homeowner associations 🖋️

As soon as the homeowner association reaches you to get a quote, quickly send them an overview of your services and fees by creating  Quotations in the Sales application where you can directly use the "Kick-Off Quote" quotation template. This will automatically fill the quote by adding the kick-off fees and also the price of all the extra services such as the recurring contribution, the hourly rate, etc. Don't forget to attach the terms & conditions as well. Of course, the price of each service and the content of the Quotation Templates can be adapted accordingly.

🎓 Sales

🎓 Quotation Template

Never forget a task ⚡

Once the quotation is confirmed, it automatically creates Projects including several tasks to properly start the collaboration. This is based on the Kick-Off Template project:

  • Contracts establishment
  • Condominium creation in Odoo (see Quickly Set Up a Condominium  🚀 section)
  • Properties creation in Odoo (see Know the stakeholders 🔎 section)
  • Helpdesk creation in Odoo (see Provide the best customer service 🆘 section)
  • Accounting opening/handover
  • Audit
  • Meters reading
  • Act analysis
  • Insurances analysis
  • Kick-off meeting
  • Call for working and reserve funds
  • ...

Again, feel free to edit and/or create new tasks to never forget a step during the kick-off process.

Quickly set up a condominium  🚀

Once the quotation is confirmed, the condominium should be created in Odoo. Basically, a condominium is like a company that is funded by the owners and that has to pay for operating costs.

From the Settings, create a new company in Companies to manage the Once done, it will appear on the top right of all screens with the aim to quickly switch between your company and the different condominiums:

​

🎓 Companies

Know the stakeholders 🔎

In the Contacts application, easily create an address book containing all the owners, tenants, suppliers, etc. It is useful to fill the following information:

  • The contact name.
  • The postal address.
  • The phone numbers.
  • The email address.

Once done, create all the Properties belonging to the Each property corresponds to an apartment, a studio, a flat, a house, etc. that is characterized by:

  • A name to identify the property, for example the post box or the identification code.
  • The condominium to which the property belongs.
  • The owner of the property.
  • The tenant.
  • The area from which the ownership percentage will be computed. This defines the proportion of the property in the condominium and it will be useful to split the costs (see  Fairly split the costs ⚖️ section) and to weight the votes of the owners when decisions must be taken during the general meetings.

In the contact form, the information about the related properties  are summarized.

Provide the best customer service 🆘

Since the requests from the homeowner association could come from several owners, it would be easier to centralize them all. Create  Helpdesk Teams for each condominium under your responsibility. Don't forget to define an email alias and share it with the owners. Thereby, they will easily send requests that will be centralized in a single point as tickets. This eases the follow-up and the invoicing in case the time spent is not covered by the service fees.

🎓 Helpdesk

Fairly split the costs ⚖️

Each owner has to pay recurring fees:

  • The working fund that is used to pay the common charges such as monthly expenses (water, electricity, gas, etc.), insurances, maintenance, repairs, cleaning of common areas, etc. 
  • The reserve fund that is a savings account used in case of exceptional expenses such as a severe repair, an investment in equipment, etc.
  • The services provided by the condominium management company.

On the one hand, the funds requests are sent by the condominium to the owners. On the other hand, the service fees can be invoiced by "My Condominium Management" to the owners. Here are the steps to follow:

  1. Select the right company from which the fees will be invoiced (see Quickly set up a condominium  🚀 section to see how to switch the company).
  2. In the Sales application, create a quotation and set the condominium as customer.
  3. In case of recurring fees:
    1. Define a recurring plan, monthly or yearly.
    2. Set the recurring plan start date.
    3. Make sure that the products added are recurring.
  5. Add the corresponding product(s): "Working Fund", "Reserve Fund", "Service Fees", etc.
  6. Set the right (recurring) price.
  7. Click on "Split per Property" button: this will cancel the current quotation and will recreate as many quotations as properties in the condominium for which the costs are shared.  
  8. Click on the "Sales Orders" buttons to access all the generated quotations.
  9. Check if everything is correct. If yes, select all the quotations and, under the "Actions" button, click on "Confirm".
  10. In case of recurring fees, the invoices will be automatically generated by Odoo at the right date. If not, you can manually post them in mass. Then just send them using your preferred way!

For example, to collect the cotisations, the selected company must be the condominium and the customer must be the condominium too. If you want to invoice your services, the selected company must be yours and the customer must be the condominium to be invoiced.

🎓 Subscription

Book the right numbers 🧾

A condominium works like a company. It gets revenues from the owners. These are collected in two bank accounts that can be directly integrated with the bank:

  • Working Fund: to collect all the money that will be used to pay the recurring fees.
  • Reserve Fund: to collect all the money that will be used in case of exceptional expense.

These will be used to pay the Vendor Bills that can be uploaded and automatically booked thanks to Artificial Intelligence.

By the end of the period, easily generate the legal reporting such as Balance Sheet and Profit & Loss for each

🎓 Accounting

Schedule the meetings 📅

Every year, a general meeting is scheduled to talk about the financial statements, to take important decisions and so on. This event can easily be scheduled in the Calendar app by creating  Meetings. To invite all the owners of a condominium, use the "Search More" on "Attendees" and type the name of the Condominium in... "Condominiums":

​

Efficiently count the votes 🧮

During the general meetings, counting the votes depending on the ownership percentage could be painful. From the  Properties screen, select all the properties of the corresponding condominium and insert them in a spreadsheet:

Use the power of formulas to quickly count the votes. See an example of spreadsheet in  Documents. 

🎓 Spreadsheet
